holdings.infoBox: BGRO is an equity ETF with a total of 34 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 13.30%, Amazon.com at 7.61%, Apple at 5.88%, Alphabet at 5.34%, and Microsoft at 5.18%.

overview.description: The iShares Large Cap Growth Active ETF (BGRO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a portfolio of US large-cap stocks exhibiting growth characteristics. BGRO was launched on Jun 4, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
